marketState: neutral, conflicting signals (storage surplus + weak seasonality vs strong weather demand)

Technicals show a bearish structure on 1h/4h/1d/1w (death cross, negative MACD) with price stretched below the daily lower Bollinger band (RSI 34) - an oversold condition inside a downtrend rather than a confirmed reversal. Net effect: no strong directional edge for the medium-term, but a tactical bounce setup for the very short term backed by hot-weather demand.

longTerm.rationale: Seasonality (priority 1) is bearish-tilted but self-flagged 'Low' reliability (50pp spread), while weather (priority 2) is clearly bullish with demand +16%/+8.4% above 5y and rising; fair value (priority 3) shows price already FAIR with no edge.
